rationale: In the citing paper, Swait and Erdem (2002) appears only in a grouped parenthetical citation listing prior work on stock-outs and availability-related phenomena. The paper does not discuss this source's specific theory, variables, findings, or model, and it is not used to develop hypotheses, mechanisms, or empirical design. Its role is broad background positioning of an existing literature stream rather than a distinct functional input to the jilting framework.
